description_long: This object is a desktop condenser microphone, featuring a cylindrical black body with a metallic mesh grille covering the top half, designed to capture sound. The microphone is mounted on a sturdy, circular silver stand with curved arms that cradle the body, allowing for tilt adjustment. On the front, there are two prominent control knobs and a central button, likely for gain, volume, or mute functions. The rear side also features two control knobs, indicating additional audio or pattern controls. The overall design is robust and professional, with a combination of matte black and metallic silver finishes. This type of microphone is commonly used for podcasting, streaming, or professional audio recording in urban environments.
description: A professional desktop condenser microphone with a black cylindrical body, metallic mesh grille, and silver adjustable stand, featuring multiple control knobs and buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mesh grille, two control knobs, and a central button on the black body, with the silver stand visible at the base.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the tilt of the microphone within the silver stand and the cylindrical shape of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two additional control knobs on the back of the microphone, with the stand's arms framing the body.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the microphone's tilt and the attachment points of the stand.
